Shore Things so you can sail, sled, and sea Alaska

 

Our one-of-a-kind Alaskan voyages just got even more exciting. Our new slate of
250+ incredible Shore Things guarantees that you'll be able to make the most of
each port with experiences you won't find on any other cruise line. Don't
believe us? Check out these highlights:

And that's just to name a few! Explore rugged landscapes by day, and return to
the unmatched luxury of our newest Lady Ship, Brilliant Lady, by night. She's
thoughtfully redesigned to maximize every incredible view and features all-new
dining, entertainment, and ship spaces for you to explore - all part of our
mission to do Alaska in a way you can't find anywhere else.





What are you waiting for?
There's no better way to sea Alaska.
